treatment_recommendation: [Organic] Atoxigenic Aspergillus biocontrol: 10 kg/ha soil application | [Chemical] Carbendazim seed treatment: 2 g/kg seed as dry seed treatment
[Organic] Trichoderma viride seed treatment: 4 g/kg seed | [Chemical] Thiram + Carbendazim seed treatment: 3 g/kg seed
[Organic] Trichoderma harzianum soil drench: 5 kg/ha mixed with FYM before sowing + 2 g/L soil drench at 30 DAS | [Chemical] Tebuconazole soil drench: 1.5 mL/L water as soil drench around stem base
[Organic] Trichoderma harzianum soil drench: 5 kg/ha mixed with FYM before sowing + 2 g/L soil drench at 30 DAS | [Chemical] Tebuconazole soil drench: 1.5 mL/L water as soil drench around stem base
[Organic] Paecilomyces lilacinus biocontrol: 5 kg/ha mixed with FYM at sowing | [Chemical] Fluopyram seed treatment: 0.57 mL/kg seed
[Organic] Trichoderma harzianum soil drench: 5 kg/ha mixed with FYM before sowing + 2 g/L soil drench at 30 DAS | [Chemical] Tebuconazole soil drench: 1.5 mL/L water as soil drench around stem base
[Organic] Blue/yellow sticky traps for thrips monitoring: 20-25 traps per hectare | [Chemical] Fipronil seed treatment: 6 mL/kg seed
